rows.label: qev027105_MSG0020
rows.name:
Phew-! Thanks to the pizza I had for breakfast at ROSE・MOSS,
I'm in perfect form again today, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027105_MSG0021
rows.name:
At this rate, I'm going to campaign aggressively
and aim to join the provisional government, jaaan! [ST:wait ]
